backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining all CMS data types (Artwork, Testimonial, BlogPost, etc.) and providing shared/query functions for managing artworks, inquiries, notifications, site settings, and basic page-view/visitor tracking.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of all hardcoded 'Marina Vasquez' string occurrences with 'Susan Richten' across specified frontend files, with high confidence and linked to test REQ-71.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to one-sentence summaries describing each component or page's purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app with meta description and page title set to 'Susan Richten — Fine Art & Commissions'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app that configures TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the tree in CMS/Auth/Theme providers, and defines a PublicLayout with Header, Footer, and page-view tracking hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/AboutPageE: An admin editor for the About page that allows updating the artist bio, artist statement, career milestones, and press mention links via form inputs.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: The admin shell layout component providing a sidebar navigation with route links, mobile overlay menu, authentication guard, and an outlet for nested admin pages.
frontend/src/components/admin/ArtworkFor: Modal form component for creating or editing an Artwork, with fields for title, year, category, medium, size, image URLs, and toggle flags like featured/available/visible.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostFo: Modal form component for creating or editing a blog post, with fields for title, auto-generated slug, content, publish date, and draft/published status.
frontend/src/components/admin/Commission: Admin editor for the Commissions page that allows updating hero/pricing text, adding/deleting process steps, and managing FAQ items via the CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeroEditor: Admin form for editing the homepage hero section fields (artist name, tagline, intro text) and saving them to site settings via the CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/InquiryRow: Table row component that displays a commission inquiry's details and provides a button to cycle its status through new, in-progress, completed, and declined states.
Grid tile component for a media library item that displays the image with hover actions for deletion, and supports inline tag management (add/remove).
frontend/src/components/admin/Navigation: Admin editor for managing site navigation items, allowing adding, removing, and editing each item's label and path, then saving the updated list via the CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/PressEdito: Admin UI component for managing press mentions, allowing users to add, edit, and delete entries (publication, date, headline, URL, excerpt) with save confirmation via CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Admin UI component for managing testimonials, supporting add/edit/delete of quote, name, location, and role fields with save state synced to CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkCard.tsx: Artwork card component displaying an image with availability and photo-count badges, hover overlay, metadata text, and a 'Request This Style' button for sold works that navigates to the commissions page.
Fixed-position button that appears after scrolling 400px and smoothly scrolls the page back to the top when clicked.
frontend/src/components/BeforeAfterSlide: Interactive drag/touch slider component that reveals a 'before' image over an 'after' image by clipping based on a draggable divider position.
frontend/src/components/Breadcrumbs.tsx: Renders a simple two-level breadcrumb nav with a Home link and the current page name, separated by a chevron icon.
frontend/src/components/CareerTimeline.t: Displays a vertical timeline of career milestones, each with a year label, dot marker, and event description.
frontend/src/components/CommissionInquir: A two-step commission inquiry form with validation that collects contact info, project details, budget, and timeline, then submits via CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: A simple contact form with name, email, and message fields that validates input and submits inquiries through CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/FAQAccordion.tsx: An accordion component that renders a list of FAQ items, toggling one open at a time with an animated chevron indicator.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand info, sorted navigation links, social icons, page view/unique visitor counters, and an admin sign-in link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a brand logo, desktop navigation links with active-state highlighting, and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSlideshow.ts: Full-screen hero slideshow that cycles through artwork images every 5 seconds with fade transitions, prev/next arrows, dot indicators, and CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: A fullscreen lightbox modal component that displays artwork images with support for multiple photos per artwork, keyboard navigation, dot indicators, and prev/next artwork browsing.
A small presentational component that renders a styled italic placeholder message when information is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterSignup: A newsletter subscription form component that captures an email address and shows a confirmation message on submission, using placeholder text from CMS settings.
frontend/src/components/PlaceholderImage: A lazy-loading image component that renders a beige placeholder until the element is visible in the viewport, then loads the actual image.
frontend/src/components/PressMentionCard: A card component that displays a press mention with publication name, date, headline, excerpt, and an external link icon.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A loading skeleton component that renders placeholder shimmer layouts for artwork, testimonial, or press card variants, supporting a configurable count.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonForm.tsx: A loading skeleton component that mimics a contact/commission form layout with shimmer placeholders for fields and a submit button.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialCarou: A carousel component that cycles through testimonials one at a time with prev/next buttons and dot indicators.
A grid component that renders all testimonials as bordered cards in a two-column layout.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: React context providing simple password-based admin authentication with login, logout, and change-password functionality, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/CMSContext.tsx: Central CMS React context defining all data types (Artwork, Testimonial, PressMention, etc.) and default site settings, backed by useCMSBackend for persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCMSBackend.ts: Custom hook providing type conversion helpers and CRUD operations between frontend CMS types and ICP backend Candid types via the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLazyLoad.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to lazily mark a div element as visible when it enters the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageMeta.ts: Custom hook that updates the document title and meta description based on SEO settings from the CMS context for a given page.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageViewTracker.ts: Custom hook that increments the page view count on mount and returns the current page view count from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating page view counts and unique visitor counts via the canister actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUniqueVisitorTrack: Custom hook that generates or retrieves a persistent visitor ID from localStorage and registers it as a unique visitor on mount.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining a design token palette (beige, charcoal, gold) and utility classes for typography, animations, and layout.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page displaying the artist's bio, portrait, social links, artist statement, career timeline, and press mentions sourced from the CMS context.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page with a password input form (show/hide toggle) that calls the AuthContext login function and displays an error on failure.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogManager.tsx: Admin blog manager that lists all blog posts in a table with publish/draft status toggling, and supports creating, editing, and deleting posts via a form modal.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommissionsMana: Admin commissions manager that displays commission inquiries filtered by status, shows a new-inquiry badge count, and supports CSV export of the filtered list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying stats (total artworks, categories, new inquiries, featured works) and quick action buttons for navigating to gallery, blog, and commissions management.
Admin gallery management page that lists artworks with sorting, selection, bulk actions (feature, mark sold/available, delete), and an artwork add/edit form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaLibrary.ts: Admin media library page for uploading and browsing images, with search filtering by filename or tag and a responsive grid of media tiles.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MessagesInbox.t: Admin inbox page for viewing and managing contact/commission notifications, with filter tabs (all/unread/responded), expandable message rows, and delete confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PagesEditor.tsx: Admin pages editor with tabbed navigation for editing content sections (hero, navigation, about, commissions, testimonials, press) and a preview link for each page.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Settings.tsx: Admin settings page for managing site-wide configuration including SEO per page, social platform URLs, and a change-password form with validation.
frontend/src/pages/Commissions.tsx: Commissions page showing a hero, process steps, pricing info, portfolio sample with lightbox, commission inquiry form, and FAQ accordion from CMS data.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a message form, studio location, a decorative map placeholder, and social media links pulled from CMS site settings.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page that displays filterable, searchable artwork cards with category tabs, a lightbox viewer, and URL-based lightbox opening via `?open=<id>` query param.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero slideshow, featured artworks grid, and testimonials section, with navigation to the gallery lightbox when a featured artwork is clicked.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials & Press page that renders client testimonials in either carousel or grid view, plus a press mentions section, using CMS data.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including beige/charcoal/gold/sage color palettes using oklch, Cormorant Garamond and Lato font families, custom border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 39) describing the full architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions for Susan Richten's art portfolio website built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and a local JSON-based CMS with a password-protected admin panel.
